front_page.body: The wildcat action began at the night shift. Cranes idle, 6,000 boxes stranded. Dockers hold the gate until the fired stewards are reinstated.
front_page.headline: Port workers walk out in solidarity; container terminal at a standstill

front_page.body: Four hundred households on Sonnenallee are now withholding rent — the largest coordinated tenant action since the 2023 deposit fight. The union answered eviction filings with a block-by-block watch.
front_page.headline: Rent strike jumps three more blocks as tenants tear up eviction notices

note: REAL projected view of signed Willow newswire records — not hand-authored.

open_wire.body: Four unmarked units, invoiced under "traffic safety." The contract and vendor spec sheet are published in full.
open_wire.headline: Leaked procurement docs show the city quietly bought facial-recognition vans

open_wire.body: Volunteers are staffing a first-aid point at the west entrance. Water and shade available.
open_wire.headline: Medic station open at the old library, side entrance

open_wire.body: Eyewitness report from the strike blocks. Bring water and legal-observer numbers.
open_wire.headline: Cops massing at the north gate, roughly forty vans

open_wire.body: The wildcat action began at the night shift. Cranes idle, 6,000 boxes stranded. Dockers hold the gate until the fired stewards are reinstated.
open_wire.headline: Port workers walk out in solidarity; container terminal at a standstill

open_wire.body: Low-altitude drone seen over the rent-strike blocks for the past twenty minutes.
open_wire.headline: Drone overhead on Sonnenallee, circling the strike blocks

open_wire.body: Four hundred households on Sonnenallee are now withholding rent — the largest coordinated tenant action since the 2023 deposit fight. The union answered eviction filings with a block-by-block watch.
open_wire.headline: Rent strike jumps three more blocks as tenants tear up eviction notices

space.name: RIOT · Independent Newswire
space.summary: An independent, worker- and tenant-led newswire. Open publishing for anyone; editorial features are signed by the collective. No owners, no ads, no trackers — just movement media that travels peer-to-peer and mirrors anywhere.
